title: Red Ocean Garden Plaque Summer House Sign Garden Shed Friendship Mum Nan Memorial Gift
features: Suitable for: Garden Signs, SummerHouse Plaque, Garden Shed Sign, Gifts for her
description: Product Description Beautiful Handmade Gifts! Made in the UK! About Us! Red Ocean Gifts include hand crafted products developed in our UK design studio, exclusive to us. We use methods such as engraving and printing to incorporate a unique design and message that evokes a positive emotion in the recipient. Every product is delicately hand made and gift packaged, so it arrives to you in pristine condition. Unique gifts that can't be found anywhere else, we know you will find a suitable gift that will be cherished. Our Hanging Signs Product Information The sign is made from PVC and is sent with wax cotton string which is a perfect length to hang up on a wall / door! Our plaques are printed with high quality ink so the sign will last a lifetime! They make amazing gifts for a friend or family member every day of the year! Sizing The hanging plaque is 200mm x 100mm/20cm x 10cm. It is a perfect size for hanging on door / wall. Waterproof Our signs are waterproof so will be suitable for all seasons for outdoors. But still perfect to have hanging inside too! The Best Things About Red Ocean Perfect as a gift Here at Red Ocean we make products that are ideal for gifting. We aim to make each receiver smile every time time they look at their gift. Beautiful Hanging Signs We have a massive range of signs to choose from. Bright colours to grunge styles, a perfect sign for everyone to choose from. Our designs are all unique so make amazing gifts. High Quality We have high quality machines and material so our products will be perfect for years to come! Our products are also quality controlled so will come looking perfect. Fast Delivery Our products will fit through the letterbox so will make the perfect gift to send to a friend or family member. Dispatched within 1 day! What happens at Red Ocean We design your gifts At Red Ocean we take great pride in our products, so we are very proud to say say our team design everything in house which are then put onto our products. Handmade products Not only do we design, we handmake and finish all our gifts in our warehouse. Sent out to you! Once the product is made it is packaged by hand to ensure the highest quality and then sent out to the customer.

specifications_table.Pre-printed: ‎I often sit in my Garden and think of you a while REMEMBERING WONDERFUL MOMENTS MY SADNESS BECOMES A SMILE For sitting in my garden is my favorite place to be For I know in my heart you'll be sitting next to me
